TruePas

Secure Access Control
at Enterprise Scale

Manage thousands of employees across multiple locations with unified face-based authentication. Real-time tracking, instant alerts, and seamless integration with your existing systems ensure security without friction.

Multi-Location Support
Synchronize data across all offices instantly, providing consistent access control regardless of facility size or geographic distribution.

Advanced Analytics
Track attendance patterns and gain operational insights through comprehensive reporting. Make data-driven decisions to optimize staffing and resource allocation.

How It works

TruePas can help you check-in anywhere in seconds

Step 1

Automatic Face Capture

Download the app and provide basic information such as your address and upload your government ID.

Guest steps up to your TruePas Kiosk. AI-powered cameras instantly detect and capture their face in under 1 second—no staff intervention, no physical contact required.

Step 2

Identity Verified within Seconds

Our AI captures your biometric data securely with liveness detection to ensure you're a real person.

Our system performs four checks (face match against secure biometrics, document validation, access confirmation, and age check) in under 3 seconds.Our system performs four checks (face match against secure biometrics, document validation, access confirmation, and age check) in under 3 seconds.

Step 3

Seamless Entry & Complete Visibility

Connect your theme park passes, cruise reservations, car rentals, or hotel bookings to your account.

Automatic access. Gates and turnstiles open, or staff are instantly notified. Track every transaction live on your dashboard with a complete audit trail.

Complete setup in under 5 minutes

TruePas Protection
Guaranteed.

Data Security

Your data stays protected with bank-grade encryption, regular audits, and compliance with GDPR and SOC 2.

Account Protection

Real-time anomaly detection with automated threat response and role-based access controls.

Multi-Factor Authentication

Every account requires secondary verification, eliminating 99.9% of unauthorized access attempts.

24/7 Support

Direct access to security specialists and technical support with guaranteed 15-minute response times.

GDPR Compliant

Reg. No: EU-GDPR-2024-7845

SOC 2 Type II

Cert. No: SOC2-TP-2024-1923

ISO 27001:2022

Cert. No: ISO-27001-TP-5678

Common Questions

Prefer to talk?

Schedule a 20-minute discovery call. No obligation.

TruePas achieves 99.8% accuracy in real-world conditions. Our system uses advanced AI models that perform reliably across different lighting, angles, and even with glasses or masks.
Our passive and active liveness detection technology prevents spoofing attempts using photos, videos, masks, or deepfakes. The system analyzes micro-movements and textures that can't be faked.
Most customers go live within 2-4 weeks. This includes integration with your existing systems, staff training, and a phased rollout to ensure smooth adoption.
Yes! TruePas can operate in offline mode with local verification. Data syncs automatically when connectivity is restored, ensuring uninterrupted service.
Absolutely. Biometric data is processed on-device and never stored in raw form. All transmitted data uses AES-256 encryption. We're SOC 2 and GDPR compliant.
Yes. While face-based verification is the fastest option, we offer fallback methods like QR codes or manual verification to accommodate user preferences and edge cases.

Check-In Bottlenecks?
